title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
prompt: Given an unsorted array of integers `nums`, return the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence. Solve in O(n).
hints: Sorting is O(n log n) — but you may want it for a baseline.
Put all values in a hash set; for each value that has no predecessor (v-1 absent), walk forward.
Each element is visited at most twice → O(n).

optimal.approach: Hash set; only start counting from sequence starts (no v-1 in set).

pitfalls: Counting from every element gives O(n^2).
Forgetting to deduplicate (a set handles this).
